googleMapsEmbedQuery: Skyline Restaurant & Banquet, 106 Ella Grasso Turnpike, Windsor Locks, CT 06096
about: Established in 1939, Skyline Restaurant & Banquet has been a cornerstone of fine Italian dining and steakhouse cuisine in the greater Hartford area for over 80 years. Located near Bradley International Airport in Windsor Locks, the restaurant combines upscale dining with warm, welcoming hospitality. Their chefs prepare freshly baked breads, soups, and sauces from scratch daily, ensuring every dish reflects their commitment to quality and tradition.
features: Banquet facility for up to 225 guests
Private dining room seats up to 40

designBrief.inspiration: Classic upscale Italian steakhouse. Rich colors, elegant type, warm ambiance.
designBrief.avoidance: No casual pizza vibes. No rustic farmhouse. Must not reuse fonts from other sites in this project.
designBrief.heroStyle: Dark rich background, elegant serif display, gold accent details
designBrief.uniqueElement: Animated banquet/event showcase or elegant menu category reveal
